steps.title: Complete the paired objects
steps.content: The sentence says researchers were studying connections between two things. The first thing is the physical location in which a social media post was created. The second thing is the post's content. Those two objects need to stay together as the object of between.

steps.title: Avoid separating the structure
steps.content: The phrase created and the post's content completes the paired structure smoothly: connections between the location and the content. A comma before and would wrongly split the two objects. A comma after content would also separate the object from the main verb analyzed, making the sentence harder to parse and grammatically incorrect. The answer is A.
